prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-FBCROSSKNF-BLK Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Cross Hunting Knife Drop Point Blade Wood Grain Handle Black Sheath Description: Add some flare to your knife collection with the ASR Outdoor Cross Hunting Knife.

This unique blade features a traditional cross on the wood grain handle, and is constructed of durable stainless steel that wont rust. The drop point blade style is ideal for tasks like cutting and carving, making it a great knife for hunters and outdoor enthusiasts. The blade itself is about 3.75" and the overall length of the knife is 7.5", the perfect size for a pocket, bag or backpack.

The knife comes with a sturdy nylon sheath that can be easily attached to a belt to keep the blade safe when not in use. This is a must-have knife for collectors and hunters alike. Search Terms: hunters knives camping carving blades collectible traditional Features: - TRADITIONAL DESIGN - Handle Features Classic Cross and Black Wood Grain | Great for Collectors - DROP POINT BLADE - Ideal for Cutting and Carving | Perfect for Hunters and Outdoor Enthusiasts - COMPACT SIZE - 3.75" Blade | 7.5" Overall | Easily Fits in Pocket, Bag or Backpack for Added Utility - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Made of Stainless Steel that Wont Rust | Every Use - NYLON SHEATH - Comes with Black Sheath to Protect Blade When Not in Use | Can Attach to Belt === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor Cross Hunting Knife Drop Point Black

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3.75 in Black Drop Point Hunting Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: Drop Point Blade, Stainless Steel, Wood Grain Handle, Compact 75 Inch, Includes Nylon Sheath

openai.title_differentiation: Wood Grain Handle, Stainless Steel, Rust Resistant, Belt Sheath, Compact Size, Collectible Design For Hunting And Carving
